Re-adjudication Request for Claim Invoice 73600
Patient: YAHIA MUDAWI AL SHRANE (MRN: 23031)
Visit Date: 2026-01-25 00:00:00
Diagnosis: I46.9-Cardiac arrest, unspecified

MEDICATION NOT REGISTERED (2 line(s)):
  The medications listed below were clinically necessary for patient care.
  These medications are approved by SFDA and were administered under physician
  supervision based on established clinical protocols.
  Request: Review and approve based on clinical necessity and SFDA registration status.
  - Seq 18: 99999999999999 - VAXCEL HEPARIN SODIUM INJECTION / 5000 IU/ML / SOLUTION FOR INJECTION X 10 (SAR 21.35)
  - Seq 14: 99999999999999 - CALCIUM CHLORIDE 10% Injection / 0.1 / Solution for Injection / 10 x 1 (SAR 4)

TARIFF ADJUSTMENT (6 line(s), total difference: 89.66 SAR):
  The rejected amounts represent rounding differences of 0.01 SAR per line item.
  Per the agreed tariff schedule between Hayat National Hospital-ABHA and
  Ministry of Health, these amounts are within the contractual tolerance.
  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.
  - Seq 17: 06288030002247 Claimed=80 Approved=8 Diff=72
  - Seq 10: MOHS-B0707 Claimed=34.28 Approved=34.27 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 7: MOHS-B0765 Claimed=85.7 Approved=85.65 Diff=0.05
  - Seq 5: MOHS-B0719 Claimed=548.44 Approved=548.43 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 3: 90660-00-00 Claimed=45 Approved=27.42 Diff=17.58
  - Seq 1: MOHS-BN011 Claimed=219.08 Approved=219.07 Diff=0.01

QUANTITY EXCEEDED (2 line(s)):
  The quantities billed reflect the actual services provided based on clinical need.
  Extended treatment was required due to patient condition complexity.
  Request: Review and approve the actual quantities administered.
  - Seq 11: MOHS-B0707 Qty=1 (SAR 34.28)
  - Seq 4: MOHS-B0743 Qty=1 (SAR 548.44)

PRIOR AUTHORIZATION (1 line(s)):
  Services were provided on an emergency/urgent basis where prior authorization
  could not be obtained in advance. Retroactive authorization is requested.
  Request: Grant retroactive authorization based on clinical urgency.
  - Seq 9: MOHS-B0730 - MORTUARY RENT PER DAY (SAR 205.67)

DISCHARGE REVIEW (1 line(s)):
  Discharge coding has been reviewed. Services provided align with the
  documented discharge disposition and clinical course.
  Request: Re-evaluate discharge compatibility.
  - Seq 8: MOHS-B0723 - INTUBATION (SAR 377.06)

---
